---
title: "NeoIPC Font Comparison"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
    papersize: a4paper
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=25mm
      - bottom=25mm
      - left=25mm
      - right=25mm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fontspec}
        \newfontfamily\ebgaramond{EB Garamond}
        \newfontfamily\notoserif{Noto Serif Condensed}
        \newfontfamily\notosans{Noto Sans}
---

## Purpose

This document compares the three fonts used across NeoIPC reports, rendered
side by side. Use it to verify that all fonts are installed and rendering
correctly.

- **EB Garamond** --- Partner-Report & Reference-Report (Latin scripts)
- **Noto Serif Condensed** --- Partner-Report & Reference-Report (non-Latin scripts, e.g. Greek)
- **Noto Sans** --- Validation-Report & Partner-Certificate

\bigskip

## Latin Sample (English)

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond The NeoIPC Surveillance Network monitors healthcare-associated infections in neonatal intensive care units across 47 countries. In 2024, a total of 12,345 patient records were validated.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif The NeoIPC Surveillance Network monitors healthcare-associated infections in neonatal intensive care units across 47 countries. In 2024, a total of 12,345 patient records were validated.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans The NeoIPC Surveillance Network monitors healthcare-associated infections in neonatal intensive care units across 47 countries. In 2024, a total of 12,345 patient records were validated.} \\
\end{tabular}

\bigskip

## Latin Sample (German)

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond Das NeoIPC-Surveillance-Netzwerk überwacht nosokomiale Infektionen in neonatologischen Intensivstationen in 47 Ländern. Im Jahr 2024 wurden insgesamt 12.345 Patientenakten validiert.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif Das NeoIPC-Surveillance-Netzwerk überwacht nosokomiale Infektionen in neonatologischen Intensivstationen in 47 Ländern. Im Jahr 2024 wurden insgesamt 12.345 Patientenakten validiert.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans Das NeoIPC-Surveillance-Netzwerk überwacht nosokomiale Infektionen in neonatologischen Intensivstationen in 47 Ländern. Im Jahr 2024 wurden insgesamt 12.345 Patientenakten validiert.} \\
\end{tabular}

\bigskip

## Greek Sample

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond Το δίκτυο επιτήρησης NeoIPC παρακολουθεί τις νοσοκομειακές λοιμώξεις σε μονάδες εντατικής θεραπείας νεογνών.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif Το δίκτυο επιτήρησης NeoIPC παρακολουθεί τις νοσοκομειακές λοιμώξεις σε μονάδες εντατικής θεραπείας νεογνών.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans Το δίκτυο επιτήρησης NeoIPC παρακολουθεί τις νοσοκομειακές λοιμώξεις σε μονάδες εντατικής θεραπείας νεογνών.} \\
\end{tabular}

\bigskip

## Numeric and Table-Like Content

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond Incidence: 3.45 / 1,000 patient-days (95\% CI: 2.81--4.09). BSI rate: 12.7\%. N = 1,234.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif Incidence: 3.45 / 1,000 patient-days (95\% CI: 2.81--4.09). BSI rate: 12.7\%. N = 1,234.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans Incidence: 3.45 / 1,000 patient-days (95\% CI: 2.81--4.09). BSI rate: 12.7\%. N = 1,234.} \\
\end{tabular}

\bigskip

## Bold and Italic Variants

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond Regular, \textbf{Bold}, \textit{Italic}, \textbf{\textit{Bold Italic}}} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif Regular, \textbf{Bold}, \textit{Italic}, \textbf{\textit{Bold Italic}}} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans Regular, \textbf{Bold}, \textit{Italic}, \textbf{\textit{Bold Italic}}} \\
\end{tabular}

\bigskip

## Headings Preview

\begin{tabular}{p{3.5cm} p{11cm}}
\textbf{EB Garamond} & {\ebgaramond\Large Section Heading \normalsize \\ Subsection text with numbers: 12,345 patients across 47 NICUs.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Serif Cond.} & {\notoserif\Large Section Heading \normalsize \\ Subsection text with numbers: 12,345 patients across 47 NICUs.} \\[6pt]
\textbf{Noto Sans} & {\notosans\Large Section Heading \normalsize \\ Subsection text with numbers: 12,345 patients across 47 NICUs.} \\
\end{tabular}
